case_title: FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC vs. ROLAND, CHUCK et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC SERVED NOV-19-2000, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROLAND, CHUCK HERNANDEZ, ABRAHAM JACOBSEN, DANA

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE JUDGMENT WAS SET ASIDE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ROLAND, CHUCK HERNANDEZ, ABRAHAM JACOBSEN, DANA
